---
title: "Contact"
---

## Contact

- **Email:** [souvik.das@tamu.edu](mailto:souvik.das@tamu.edu)  
- **Office:** PETR 230 / PETR 246  
- **Affiliation:** Department of Computer Science & Engineering,
Texas A&M University,
435 Nagle Street,
College Station, TX 77843-3112  

---

## Profiles

- [**Google Scholar**](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=7MV40LIAAAAJ&hl=en) 
- [**GitHub**](https://github.com/piy4l)  
- [**LinkedIn**](https://www.linkedin.com/in/souvik-das-048479153/) 

---

## Availability

I am open to research collaborations and discussions in:

- privacy-preserving machine learning  
- systems for secure inference  
- high-performance computing for AI  

Feel free to reach out via email.
